title: Bridge Essay: Neural bases of the bodily self as revealed by electrical brain stimulation: A systematic review.
concept: Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

**Neural bases of the bodily self as revealed by electrical brain stimulation: A systematic review.** - Hum Brain Mapp (2023). DOI: 10.1002/hbm.26253. PMID: 36852645. An increasing amount of recent research has focused on the multisensory and neural bases of the bodily self. This pre-reflective form of self is considered as multifaceted, incorporating phenomenal components, such as self location, body ownership, first-person perspective, agency, and the perceptual body image.
